title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 3 - Analyzing (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and artificial intelligence course taught by David J. Malan. The course is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, with an active community across Discord, Slack, Reddit, and other social channels.
writeup: This live, unedited CS50 session is the third chapter of an introduction to artificial intelligence taught by Brian Yu, part of Harvard University's introductory computer science and AI course associated with David J. Malan. The format is a recorded live lecture rather than an edited production. CS50 is distributed across edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, with community support on Discord, Slack, Reddit, and other channels.
